svg.text: Azure Machine Learning — Managed Endpoints with Blue/Green Deployments
Multi-Environment (Dev / Stage / Prod) with Private Networking, GPU Compute & CI/CD

g.text: GitHub Actions triggers on code push / PR merge
Self-hosted runners (in private VNet) build container & push to shared ACR
Deploy to Dev green → validate → switch traffic → promote to Stage
Stage validation → promote to Prod green (5% canary) → gradual traffic shift
DNS routing via Front Door directs public traffic to managed endpoints per environment
Training data & pre-trained models reside in Dev; Stage/Prod are inference-only
